title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
summary: Endava 正在利用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 重新设计软件交付流程，以加速开发、自动化工作流，并在企业内构建 AI 原生文化。
highlights: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery
build an AI-native culture across the enterprise
